authors.author: Melody Green
Melody Green
Er ist der Erlöser (Danke, lieber Vater)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: 1. There is a Redeemer, Jesus, God's own Son, Precious Son of God, Messiah, Holy One.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Thank you, O, my Father, for giving us your Son, And leaving your Spirit till the work on earth is done.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: 2. Jesus, my Redeemer, Name above all names, Precious Son of God, Messiah, O for sinners' slain.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Thank you, O, my Father, for giving us your Son, And leaving your Spirit till the work on earth is done.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: 3. When I stand in glory, I will see his face, And there I'll serve my King forever in that holy place.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Thank you, O, my Father, for giving us your Son, And leaving your Spirit till the work on earth is done.
